strengthAwpLimitsSettings_header.message: Show and import of the AWP strengths limits

strengthAwpLimitsSettings_intro.message: The import supports one, several or all strength values. Even a new strength value can be imported. The import of a strength and its AWPs must be given in pairs of numbers separated by a space. Example: to update the strength values 2 (AWPs: 222), 3 (AWPs: 333), 4 (AWPs: 444) and add a new strength value 55 (AWPs: 55555) the following import string has to be given: 2 222 3 333 4 444 55 55555.

strengthAwpLimitsSettings_importLabel.message: Strengths limits (pairs of number for strength AWPs, e.g. 3 333)
